name: agentic-research
description: Filesystem-first agentic research workflow plugin for theoretical CS and agent-assisted paper development.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent research workflow for theory-heavy projects.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Research turns a canonical project workspace into a repeatable pipeline for literature review, ideation, modeling, proof attempts, experiments, draft updates, and adversarial verification.
defaultPrompt: Run literature review for this research question.
Promote best idea into formal model and conjectures.
Review workspace for overclaims and novelty gaps.
